source_pr.title: *: use approximately algorithm to calculate p90 in slowlog.
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/44047

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
Use tdigest to calc p90, so eliminate memory usage of runtime info.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Left is this patch, right is master.
![image](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/14054293/43ecf7ae-5be9-421b-826b-d65032ff2c42)

- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: sort.Slice(details, func(i, j int) bool { (sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx_test.go).

evidence: evidence: sort.Slice(details, func(i, j int) bool { (sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx_test.go)

files: DEPS.bzl, distsql/BUILD.bazel, distsql/distsql_test.go, distsql/select_result.go, executor/adapter.go, go.mod, go.sum, server/conn.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/BUILD.bazel, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx_test.go, util/execdetails/BUILD.bazel, util/execdetails/execdetails.go
